who: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delayed integration. We provide an onboarding checklist generator instead of manual onboarding checklists and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delayed integration of new hires.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage on Indie Hackers about onboarding challenges
DM outreach to HR managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try customizable onboarding workflows for 1-3 new hires
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common onboarding steps as templates
Set default reminders for new hires
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
